about_quotes.speaker: Ralph LaLama
about_quotes.evidence: I play a trio, Bop Juice, it’s a trio, with Clifford Barbaro, and the bass player du jour and me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ralph LaLama interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 23, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: I got my first gigs with Clifford Barbaro the drummer. And we had a regular gig.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021
